news.title:
GE Shipping acquires a 2014 Kamsarmax vessel, expanding fleet to 41 with 3.25M dwt capacity.
Q3 FY26 profit rose 36.9% YoY to ₹812 crore; dividend declared at ₹9/share; stock up 2.1% to ₹1354.8.
news.summary:
GE Shipping acquires a 2014 Kamsarmax vessel, expanding fleet to 41 with 3.25M dwt capacity.
Q3 FY26 profit rose 36.9% YoY to ₹812 crore; dividend declared at ₹9/share; stock up 2.1% to ₹1354.8.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping to acquire a 2014-built Kamsarmax Dry Bulk Carrier, 81,094 dwt.
Jag Vishnu VLGC sale planned by Q4 FY26; purchase financed via internal accruals.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping to acquire a 2014-built Kamsarmax Dry Bulk Carrier, 81,094 dwt.
Jag Vishnu VLGC sale planned by Q4 FY26; purchase financed via internal accruals.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping took delivery of a 2013-built MR Tanker, Jag Pranesh (51,565 dwt).
The fleet totals 41 vessels; a VLGC sale is contracted for Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping took delivery of a 2013-built MR Tanker, Jag Pranesh (51,565 dwt).
The fleet totals 41 vessels; a VLGC sale is contracted for Q4 FY26.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Great Eastern Shipping's NCD rating as Crisil AAA/Stable.
NCD worth ₹450 Cr was fully redeemed, reducing total outstanding to ₹1,050 Cr.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Great Eastern Shipping's NCD rating as Crisil AAA/Stable.
NCD worth ₹450 Cr was fully redeemed, reducing total outstanding to ₹1,050 Cr.

news.title:
GE Shipping Co's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹8.4B from ₹6.1B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 57.5% from 49.39% YoY, reflecting strong performance.
news.summary:
GE Shipping Co's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹8.4B from ₹6.1B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 57.5% from 49.39% YoY, reflecting strong performance.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping declared a third interim dividend of ₹9/share.
This reflects its ongoing commitment to shareholder value.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping declared a third interim dividend of ₹9/share.
This reflects its ongoing commitment to shareholder value.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping reported Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs. 1,736.5 Cr and profit of Rs. 812.5 Cr.
Declared Rs. 9/share interim dividend, appointed Lead Independent Director, and updated fleet with sales/acquisitions.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping reported Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs. 1,736.5 Cr and profit of Rs. 812.5 Cr.
Declared Rs. 9/share interim dividend, appointed Lead Independent Director, and updated fleet with sales/acquisitions.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping (BSE: 500620) to host investor/analyst meet in Mumbai on Feb 2, 2026.
The meet is arranged by MUFG Corporate Markets under SEBI Regulation 30 (LODR).
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping (BSE: 500620) to host investor/analyst meet in Mumbai on Feb 2, 2026.
The meet is arranged by MUFG Corporate Markets under SEBI Regulation 30 (LODR).

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping delivered 2011-built Jag Aarati in Q3 FY26; fleet now 39 vessels.
Total capacity is 3.14 mn dwt; plans include buying 2 vessels and selling 1 in Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping delivered 2011-built Jag Aarati in Q3 FY26; fleet now 39 vessels.
Total capacity is 3.14 mn dwt; plans include buying 2 vessels and selling 1 in Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping received 2015-built VLGC 'Jag Vijay' on Jan 16, 2026, with 84,048 cubic meters capacity.
The acquisition was fully financed via internal accruals. Current fleet stands at 40 vessels with nearly 100% utilization.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping received 2015-built VLGC 'Jag Vijay' on Jan 16, 2026, with 84,048 cubic meters capacity.
The acquisition was fully financed via internal accruals. Current fleet stands at 40 vessels with nearly 100% utilization.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping to hold board meeting on January 29, 2026.
Meeting will consider Q3 FY25-26 results and interim dividend declaration.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping to hold board meeting on January 29, 2026.
Meeting will consider Q3 FY25-26 results and interim dividend declaration.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping executed a block trade of ~182,630 shares at Rs. 1102.9.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 20.1 crores.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping executed a block trade of ~182,630 shares at Rs. 1102.9.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 20.1 crores.

news.title:
Brickwork Ratings reaffirmed Great Eastern Shipping's NCDs at BWR AAA with Stable outlook.
The rating cites strong financials, diversified fleet, global presence, and prudent risk management.
news.summary:
Brickwork Ratings reaffirmed Great Eastern Shipping's NCDs at BWR AAA with Stable outlook.
The rating cites strong financials, diversified fleet, global presence, and prudent risk management.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping to acquire 51,565 DWT secondhand tanker from South Korea by Q4 FY26.
The company is also purchasing secondhand gas and dry bulk carriers.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping to acquire 51,565 DWT secondhand tanker from South Korea by Q4 FY26.
The company is also purchasing secondhand gas and dry bulk carriers.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping to sell 2002-built Jag Vishnu, 77,922 cbm, in Q4 FY26.
Company's fleet: 39 vessels, 3.17 Mn dwt; plans 2 acquisitions, 1 sale in Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping to sell 2002-built Jag Vishnu, 77,922 cbm, in Q4 FY26.
Company's fleet: 39 vessels, 3.17 Mn dwt; plans 2 acquisitions, 1 sale in Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping's subsidiary dissolved by NCLT after voluntary liquidation.
Subsidiary had zero revenue in FY25; net worth was Rs. 17.73 lakh.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping's subsidiary dissolved by NCLT after voluntary liquidation.
Subsidiary had zero revenue in FY25; net worth was Rs. 17.73 lakh.

news.title:
NCLT has ordered the dissolution of Greatship Oilfield Services Ltd (GOSL), a subsidiary of GIL.
As of March 31, 2025, GOSL reported nil revenue and a net worth of Rs. 17.7 lakhs.
news.summary:
NCLT has ordered the dissolution of Greatship Oilfield Services Ltd (GOSL), a subsidiary of GIL.
As of March 31, 2025, GOSL reported nil revenue and a net worth of Rs. 17.7 lakhs.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping to buy a secondhand Very Large Gas Carrier of 84,048 cbm, built in 2015.
The vessel will join the fleet in Q4 FY26, funded through internal resources for expansion.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping to buy a secondhand Very Large Gas Carrier of 84,048 cbm, built in 2015.
The vessel will join the fleet in Q4 FY26, funded through internal resources for expansion.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping to sell 2011-built Kamsarmax vessel 'Jag Aarati' by Q4 FY26.
The company’s current fleet stands at 40 vessels.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping to sell 2011-built Kamsarmax vessel 'Jag Aarati' by Q4 FY26.
The company’s current fleet stands at 40 vessels.

news.title:
Great Eastern Shipping executed an NSE block trade for ~707,304 shares at Rs. 1106.
The transaction's total value amounted to Rs. 78.2 crores.
news.summary:
Great Eastern Shipping executed an NSE block trade for ~707,304 shares at Rs. 1106.
The transaction's total value amounted to Rs. 78.2 crores.
